scores.rationale: All five entries are complete assertion sentences with clear subject, direction, and implication (capacity leak → reminders reduced misses → recovered appointments fund rollout → readiness conditions → approve rollout), reading as action titles rather than section labels and preserving the outline decision arc. The deterministic '이다' suffix is the expected machine-generated title-lint target, so it does not detract from conclusiveness or introduce unsupported claims.
